description: Yellow and grey backpack with branding on the top of the covering flap Two adjustable, heavily padded shoulder straps with connecting strap with a click closure, a padded strap for added support around your waist with click clock closure, haul loops at the bottom One main compartment with toggle strap closure and internal pockets with a velcro closure with removable metal inserts for better support, flap with click closure, an internal zippered pocket and adjustable straps on top to cover the main compartment opening Two mesh pockets on the sides and a zippered compartment near the bottom One zippered compartment at the bottom to store the attached and elasticated rain cover for the bag to protect your belongings Adjustable straps with click clock closures around the sides and bottom Adjustable strap around the sides near the bottom Padded back and firm support at the back for support for heavy loadWarranty: 5 years against manufacturing defects Please note that the thread colour in the brand logo may vary from the image shown.Warranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
